title: Review of Speed Estimation Algorithms for Three-Phase Induction Motor
author: Elbarbary, Al-Harbi, et al.

steps.title: Direct calculation method
steps.instruction: Its simplicity and quick computational time distinguish the direct calculation approach of speed estimation for induction motors. the procedure of rotor flux estimation is the essential component of a speed estimation scheme [33,66,71,72]. The procedures included in rotor speed estimation might be clarified into the following [73]: First, the rotor flux in the stationary frame of reference depending on the obtained voltages and currents of stator is estimated utilizing Eqs.¬†(12) and (13).(12)dőĽqrsdt=LrLmvqss‚ąíLrLm(Rsiqss+ŌÉLsdiqssdt)(13)dőĽdrsdt=LrLmvdss‚ąíLrLm(Rsidss+ŌÉLsdidssdt)(14)pőĽqrs=LmTriqss+ŌČrőĽdrs‚ąí1TrőĽqrs(15)pőĽdrs=LmTridss‚ąíŌČrőĽqrs‚ąí1TrőĽdrs
